description: Cross-component contract for the owner-scoped, persisted factual work record of one thread.

query.cursor: optional opaque HMAC-authenticated cursor returned by the prior response

identity.sequence: strictly increasing and immutable within one persisted thread

cursor_integrity: HMAC-SHA-256 signed with the server authentication secret; unsigned or modified cursors are invalid.

paging.initial: returns the latest bounded factual window and a cursor at its watermark; truncated is true when older matching facts exist
paging.incremental: a returned cursor reads factual records after its confirmed sequence through the response watermark, in ascending seq order
paging.has_more: when true, send the returned cursor again before advancing the confirmed projection watermark

errors.409: cursor is invalid, bound to another owner/thread, or ahead of the available factual watermark; discard the local projection and re-read without a cursor

consumer_rules: Treat cursor as opaque and do not construct it in the browser.
Deduplicate by event_id and order only by seq; browser arrival order is not factual order.
The endpoint exposes persisted facts only. It does not decide task quality, acceptance, rework, or a next action.
The current endpoint is forward-only. A truncated initial window is not a claim that the browser holds the complete thread history.
